description: The payment-gateway deployment in the ecommerce namespace has an audit-logger sidecar container that currently uses static, hardcoded environment variables for telemetry, causing inaccurate logs. Refactor the deployment to dynamically inject metadata using the Downward API. Configure APP_POD_NAME, APP_POD_NAMESPACE, HOST_IP, and POD_IP environment variables in the audit-logger container using fieldRefs for metadata.name, metadata.namespace, status.hostIP, and status.podIP respectively. Set the MAIN_CPU_LIMIT environment variable using a resourceFieldRef pointing to the gateway-app container's limits.cpu with a divisor of 1m. Implement a downwardAPI volume named pod-metadata that maps metadata.labels to labels and metadata.annotations to annotations, and mount this volume at /etc/podinfo within the audit-logger container. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
